title: zornia hebecarpa
intro: Zornia hebecarpa, also known as the small flower zornia, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, native to tropical America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Zornia hebecarpa include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal problems. Zornia hebecarpa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a valuable component in traditional medicine.
